229- 230-**Path**: `.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-update-with-landed-pr.md` 231- 232:**What it does**: Updates objective after landing a PR. Marks steps as done, posts action comment, reconciles stale prose sections. 233- 234-**Mutation flow**: 235- 236-1. Determine which steps the PR completed (compare plan to roadmap) 237:2. Compose action comment with summary and lessons learned 238-3. **Compose updated objective body:** 239- - Parse YAML frontmatter 240- - Update relevant step(s): set `pr: "#<number>"` and `status: "done"` 241- - Serialize updated YAML and replace metadata block 242- - Also update markdown table in objective-body comment 243- - Reconcile stale prose sections (Design Decisions, Implementation Context) 244:4. Post action comment to GitHub 245-5. Write updated body to GitHub 246-6. Check if all steps are done/skipped → close objective if complete 247- 248:**Agent workflow**: Single-agent pattern. Agent fetches context, then performs all updates directly (roadmap steps, prose reconciliation, action comment, validation). 249- 250-### Node Description Reconciliation 251- -- 390-│ ↓ │ 391-│ erk system:objective-update-with-landed-pr │ 392-│ ↓ │ 393:│ - Post action comment │ 394-│ - Update roadmap: pr="#N", status="done" │ 395-│ - Reconcile stale prose sections │

1---- 2-title: Objective Exec Command Consolidation 3-read_when: 4: - "working with the objective-apply-landed-update exec script" 5- - "modifying how objectives are updated after landing a PR" 6- - "adding new discovery patterns to exec scripts" 7-tripwires: 8: - action: "adding a required parameter to objective-apply-landed-update without fallback discovery" 9- warning: "The script auto-fills missing parameters from git/plan state. New parameters should follow the same pattern: explicit flag first, then auto-discovery fallback." 10- - action: "passing None for optional discovery flags and assuming defaults" 11- warning: "Optional discovery flags (--plan, --objective, --pr) have complex fallback chains. Test edge cases where the fallback source is unavailable (branch deleted, plan not found, PR not created)." -- 17- 18-# Objective Exec Command Consolidation 19- 20:The `objective-apply-landed-update` exec script consolidates what was previously a multi-step workflow into a single command. 21- 22-## Location 23- -- 31- 32-1. **Fetch context** — Builds roadmap context and fetches objective content from GitHub 33-2. **Update nodes** — Marks relevant roadmap nodes as done with PR references, updates the comment tracking table 34:3. **Post action comment** — Formats and posts a structured action comment to the objective issue 35- 36-## TypedDict Schema 37- -- 40-Result types are defined in `erk_shared/objective_apply_landed_update_result.py`: 41-
... [5 lines omitted] ...

70-| `marker read` | Read content from a marker file. | 71-| `migrate-objective-schema` | Migrate an objective's roadmap YAML to the latest schema (v4). | 72-| `normalize-tripwire-candidates` | Normalize agent-produced tripwire candidate JSON in-place. | 73:| `objective-apply-landed-update` | Apply mechanical updates to an objective after landing a PR. | 74-| `objective-fetch-context` | Fetch all context for objective update in a single call. | 75-| `objective-link-pr` | Link PR number to objective roadmap nodes from .erk/impl-context/ metadata. | 76-| `objective-plan-setup` | Fetch, validate, and set up context for objective planning. | -- 844-| ------------------- | ---- | -------- | -------------- | -------------------------------- | 845-| `--candidates-file` | TEXT | Yes | Sentinel.UNSET | Path to tripwire-candidates.json | 846- 847:### objective-apply-landed-update 848- 849-Apply mechanical updates to an objective after landing a PR. 850- 851:**Usage:** `erk exec objective-apply-landed-update` 852- 853-**Options:** 854-
session.assistant: Let me read the specific sections to update:
session.tool_result: 225→- PR is set (no explicit status) → status = `in_progress` 226→- Neither → preserve existing status 227→ 228→### Full-Body Update: `system:objective-update-with-landed-pr` 229→ 230→**Path**: `.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-update-with-landed-pr.md` 231→ 232→**What it does**: Updates objective after landing a PR. Marks steps as done, posts action comment, reconciles stale prose sections. 233→ 234→**Mutation flow**: 235→ 236→1. Determine which steps the PR completed (compare plan to roadmap) 237→2. Compose action comment with summary and lessons learned 238→3. **Compose updated objective body:** 239→ - Parse YAML frontmatter 240→ - Update relevant step(s): set `pr: "#<number>"` and `status: "done"` 241→ - Serialize updated YAML and replace metadata block 242→ - Also update markdown table in objective-body comment 243→ - Reconcile stale prose sections (Design Decisions, Implementation Context) 244→4. Post action comment to GitHub 245→5. Write updated body to GitHub 246→6. Check if all steps are done/skipped → close objective if complete 247→ 248→**Agent workflow**: Single-agent pattern. Agent fetches context, then performs all updates directly (roadmap steps, prose reconciliation, action comment, validation). 249→ 250→### Node Description Reconciliation 251→ 252→When a plan's implementation diverges from the original node description (e.g., the node says `@json_output` but the PR implemented `@json_command`), this is a "naming divergence" contradiction. The description must be updated to reflect what was actually built. 253→ 254→**Workflow**: Update node descriptions BEFORE prose updates, because comment re-rendering uses the current descriptions:

28→## Three-Step Consolidation 29→ 30→The script combines three operations into a single invocation: 31→ 32→1. **Fetch context** — Builds roadmap context and fetches objective content from GitHub 33→2. **Update nodes** — Marks relevant roadmap nodes as done with PR references, updates the comment tracking table 34→3. **Post action comment** — Formats and posts a structured action comment to the objective issue 35→ 36→## TypedDict Schema 37→ 38→<!-- Source: packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/objective_apply_landed_update_result.py --> 39→ 40→Result types are defined in `erk_shared/objective_apply_landed_update_result.py`: 41→ 42→- **`NodeUpdateDict`** — Tracks `node_id`, `previous_pr` for each updated node 43→- **`ApplyLandedUpdateResultDict`** — Success result including `objective`, `plan`, `pr`, `roadmap`, `node_updates`, `action_comment_id` 44→- **`ApplyLandedUpdateErrorDict`** — Error case with `success` flag and `error` message 45→ 46→## Auto-Discovery Pattern 47→ 48→The script auto-fills missing parameters using a cascading discovery chain: 49→ 50→1. **Branch** — Auto-filled from current git branch if not provided 51→2. **Plan** — If `--plan` is provided, use it directly (direct lookup). Otherwise, discover via `plan_backend.get_plan_for_branch()` 52→3. **Objective** — If `--objective` is provided, use it directly. Otherwise, extract from `plan_result.objective_id`

847→### objective-apply-landed-update 848→ 849→Apply mechanical updates to an objective after landing a PR. 850→ 851→**Usage:** `erk exec objective-apply-landed-update` 852→ 853→**Options:** 854→ 855→| Flag | Type | Required | Default | Description | 856→| -------------- | ------- | -------- | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | 857→| `--pr` | INTEGER | No | - | PR number (auto-discovered if omitted) | 858→| `--objective` | INTEGER | No | - | Objective issue (auto-discovered if omitted) | 859→| `--branch` | TEXT | No | - | Branch name (auto-discovered if omitted) | 860→| `--node` | TEXT | No | Sentinel.UNSET | Node ID(s) to mark as done (e.g., --node 1.1 --node 1.2) | 861→| `--auto-close` | FLAG | No | - | Automatically close the objective if all nodes are complete | 862→ 863→### objective-fetch-context 864→ 865→Fetch all context for objective update in a single call. 866→ 867→**Usage:** `erk exec objective-fetch-context` 868→ 869→**Options:** 870→ 871→| Flag | Type | Required | Default | Description | 872→| ------------- | ------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | 873→| `--pr` | INTEGER | No | - | PR number (auto-discovered if omitted) | 874→| `--objective` | INTEGER | No | - | Objective issue (auto-discovered if omitted) | 875→| `--branch` | TEXT | No | - | Branch name (auto-discovered if omitted) | 876→| `--plan` | INTEGER | No | - | PR number (direct lookup, skips branch-based discovery) |

tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: **What it does**: Updates objective after landing a PR. Marks steps as done, posts action ...[truncated 713 chars]...ms all updates directly (roadmap steps, prose reconciliation, action comment, validation).
